description: Build the parent-owned rewards/objectives/badges/points/progress data model according to the approved domain references.

items.description: Inventory current repo reality and confirm the target rewards model file map before adding tables.
steps: Search for any existing rewards/objectives/badges/points/progress models, migrations, or tests.
Record the exact target table/model file map before editing.
Confirm no unrelated models are collapsed into a single file.

items.description: Add the rewards account / points ledger foundation tables and models.
steps: Create the current-state rewards account table(s) for global points balance, tier, and summary state.
Create append-only event/ledger tables for points and reward-related state changes.
Keep one table/model per file.

items.description: Add tier and milestone definition tables/models using the approved Bronze/Silver/Gold/Platinum/Plus and 100-point milestone rules.
steps: Create tier definition and milestone definition tables/models.
Encode the approved tier and milestone structure in schema-friendly form.

items.description: Add objective and objective-progress tables/models supporting both milestone objectives and general objectives, including global/product/subscription/tier scoping.
steps: Create objective definition tables/models.
Create account objective progress tables/models.
Support milestone objectives as objectives in the same domain model.

items.description: Add reward, badge, perk/grant, and account-achievement tables/models needed to represent earned and obtainable items cleanly.
steps: Create reward definition and earned/grant tables/models.
Create badge definition and account badge tables/models.
Create any necessary reward-to-objective / reward-to-milestone linkage tables.

items.description: Add notification/presentation queue tables/models needed for queued objective completion and reward reveal flows.
steps: Create data structures supporting queued objective-completion presentation and skip/seen handling.
Preserve the distinction between auto milestone reveal flow and queued objectives-page reveal flow.

items.description: Align metadata registration, bootstrap imports, and Alembic discovery after the rewards model additions.
steps: Register the new models cleanly without collapsing them into generic files.
Confirm Alembic can discover the new metadata surface.

items.description: Run the authoritative docker test suite and mark this spec complete only when green.
steps: Run the full authoritative docker test suite.
Only mark this item complete when green.
